/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 56: Couldn't resolve reference to 'i'.: temp_control.i is an implementation, not a component type; tempin1 is not visible in temp_control type scope -> remove 'temp_control.i.' prefix from tempin1 and tempin2 references
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 56: left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type '<error>' and 'int', but must be of the same type: temp1 is a port in temp_control type, but temp_control.i.tempin1 is invalid; tempin1 is not directly visible in temp_control type -> replace 'temp_control.i.tempin1 = temp1' with 'tempin1 = temp1'
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 58: right side of binary expression 'or' is of type '<error>' but must be of type 'bool': tempin1 and tempin2 are temperature_type (non-boolean), but 'or' requires boolean operands -> remove 'voter.tempin1 or voter.tempin2' clause; it is semantically invalid
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 83: Couldn't resolve reference to 'temp1'.: temp1 and temp2 are ports of temp_control type, not visible inside voter type scope -> remove 'temp1 = temp1' and 'temp2 = temp2' assumptions
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 85: left side of binary expression 'or' is of type 'int' but must be of type 'bool': tempin1 and tempin2 are temperature_type, not boolean; 'or' operator requires boolean operands -> replace 'tempin1 or tempin2' with 'false' to preserve valid syntax, as no valid boolean relation exists
